tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]F/A[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]F/A[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C11[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]                     [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I was in love with you, And gave my heart to you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]                   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I did my best, To keep you satisfied[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]                           [ch]Dm7[/ch]
You took the love from me, And used it selfishly[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
You did not give back,Your love to me at all[/tab]

[VErse]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I gave the sun to you, You said it was too bright[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]                         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I gave you diamond rings,You said they didn't shine[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]                         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I gave my world to you,But you said it's not enough[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                                 [ch]C11[/ch]
What in the world could I have done, To make you be so rough?[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
'Til you do me right[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm7[/ch]       [ch]F/A[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
I don't even wanna talk to you, I don't even wanna hear You speak my name[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
And 'til you do me right[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]F/A[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
Only wrong is gonna come to you, Nothin' good is gonna come[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
'Til you change, change your ways[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C11[/ch]
Until you change your evil ways[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Girl, I was there for you Someone you could talk to[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm7[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
How could you just keep Breakin' my heart?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]
What did I do to you,To make you be so cruel?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cm7[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
I don't understand Why you've been so wrong[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]                         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I tried to be your strength You said I was too strong[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I tried to compromise so We could get along[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I gave my love to you despite Your evil ways[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                            [ch]C11[/ch]
I guess it's clear to me there's only One thing left to say[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
'Til you do me right[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm7[/ch]       [ch]F/A[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
I don't even wanna talk to you, I don't even wanna hear You speak my name[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
And 'til you do me right[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]F/A[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
Only wrong is gonna come to you, Nothin' good is gonna come[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
'Til you change, change your ways[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C11[/ch]
Until you change your evil ways[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]          [ch]A7[/ch]                           [ch]Dm7[/ch]
There's a time when you know What you feel inside your heart[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7-5[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]                   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
It's tellin' you that Somethin' feels strange, (something its strange)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Am7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
You don't have to deny it All you gotta do is just try it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                          [ch]C11[/ch]
You'll find our love grows Stronger if you're willin' to change[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]

[tab]                    [ch]Gm7[/ch]       [ch]F/A[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
